sections.name: FAQs
sections.text:
Q: How to Invest in HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: You can easily invest in HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The
        process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless
        and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your
        investment objective and risk tolerance 
 Q: What kind of returns does HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth provide? A: The HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth has been there from 01 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 4.19% since its inception. 
 Q: How much expense ratio is charged by HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: The term Expense Ratio used for HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual
        charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. The Expense Ratio of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth is 0.98% as of 08 May 2026... 
 Q: What is the AUM of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: The AUM, short for Assets Under Management of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth is ₹91,334.91Cr as of 08 May 2026. 
 Q: How to Redeem HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: If you want to sell your HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or
        web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your
        desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox. 
 Q: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: You can select either SIP or Lumpsum investment of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth based on
        your investment objective and risk tolerance. 
 Q: What is the NAV of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: The NAV of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth is ₹2,163.72 as of 08 May 2026. 
 Q: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth? A: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth is determined by dividing the market price by
        its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value
        per share (BVPS).
